reviews.body: Wonderful to have a friendly local bank that is still on the high street where I can pop in a get things done quickly. Good range of savings products at a fair interest rate.

I very much regret taking a mortgage out with this building society. Worst lender I’ve encountered in over 30 years. Customer service is non existant. They want an insane amount of information when it comes to borrowing anything and then tell me that I can’t afford £5k extra on my mortgage even though my salary just increased by £14k. Won’t use the again.
Local very helpful and friendly building society

Friendly local service and good online banking. Thankfully The Cumberland Building Society is one of the very few banks left in town and soon will be the last. It is appreciated for its branch availability, friendly staff, good range of savng products and great customer service. It is the best bank I have ever dealt with.
Awful application process. Staff were like robots. Very, very disappointed and won’t use again
Great experience. Know what they're talking about and very helpful.

Unlike the big banks that have largely abandoned customers, we are delighted to have a local bank that is open 6 days a week and where the staff seem happy to see you. Convenient current account and top ISA rate.
I have been with the Cumberland for the over 10 years and have always found them to be friendly and efficient.

Really helpful local bank. They go out of their way to sort any issues out for you with local service at the end of the phone or in brach. No international help centres located halfway across the world.
The savings account is easy to use and pays a great rate. The customer service is above and beyond and it's lovely to speak to people really easily.
First Class Service from individuals that care.
